features: 3-WAY PLUG EXTENSION – This 3-way Plug Extension Lead is perfect for providing additional plug sockets in your home, office, or any other space you’re in! It comes with a 1.4 metre cable, giving you extra space to power additional items rather than needing everything to be right next to the mains socket.

USB PORTS INCLUDED – In addition to the 3 plug sockets, 3 USB ports are also included on the top of the cube, making it ideal for phone chargers, small portable speakers, and other USB-powered accessories. This gives space for a combined total of 6 plug sources!

COMPACT & LIGHTWEIGHT – The convenient, cube-shaped design makes it easy to plug & charge devices on different sides, without the wires getting in the way of each other. This compact 9cm x 9cm x 9cm design also saves space on a desk or table, and helps to keep the extension lightweight, weighing less than 500 grams.

UK PLUG SUITABLE – The 3 plug sockets feature the UK 3-pronged plug design, making it suitable for all plugs within the UK, while also working with UK plug adapters for devices that have non-UK plugs.
BENROSS – Benross manufactures a multitude of electrical appliances. From extension cords and adapters, to heaters and coolers for the home, you can find it all at the Benross store on Amazon.
description: From the manufacturer Benross 3 Way Cube Socket with USB Ports This 3-way UK plug extension lead is suitable for all UK power adapters. The extension lead is ideal for using within your home, offices or even outside in your garden if you need the power. The cube, compact and lightweight design allows you transport your extension cable around the house or office with ease while also being able to place it behind your desk or on the floor so it saves space and doesn't get in the way. The Benross extension lead is perfect for when you have a few different appliances that you need power for but your standard plug won't reach. This extension lead features a 1.4 metre length cable, which provides a longer reach for your powered devices.
